title: agentpack — Architecture & Flows
description: Local task-state ledger for AI coding agents. Pick a flow on the right to highlight the path through CLI, MCP tools, durable state, and generated handoff context.

nodes.title: Developer
nodes.summary: Runs setup commands, reviews handoffs, steers coding-agent work.

nodes.title: Coding agent
nodes.summary: Codex / Claude Code / Cursor / any MCP client. Reads instructions, calls MCP tools.

nodes.title: CI / release
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions builds, tests, smokes MCP, packs, publishes provenance releases.

nodes.title: agentpack
nodes.subtitle: package bin
nodes.summary: package.json#bin → dist/src/agentpack.js after TypeScript build.

nodes.title: src/cli/index.ts
nodes.subtitle: 495 lines
nodes.summary: Parses commands and flags, resolves --root / AGENTPACK_ROOT / cwd, dispatches CLI operations, can start MCP mode.

nodes.title: agentpack mcp
nodes.subtitle: stdio launcher
nodes.summary: Launches JSON-RPC over stdio. Root resolution: --root → AGENTPACK_ROOT → cwd.

nodes.title: src/mcp/server.ts
nodes.subtitle: 578 lines
nodes.summary: MCP tools expose context load, durable records, evidence, source status, Task Passport lifecycle, checkpoints, diffs, replay, and resume.

nodes.title: CLI commands
nodes.subtitle: human surface
nodes.summary: init · install · task · set · record · note · source · evidence · run · checkpoint · resume · export · diff · replay · ledger · doctor.

nodes.title: installIntegration()
nodes.subtitle: client installer
nodes.summary: Generates Codex / Claude / Claude Desktop / Cursor instructions + MCP config. Dry-run unless --write.

nodes.title: src/operations.ts
nodes.subtitle: 268 lines
nodes.summary: Source records, evidence files, source status, replay output, git-status labels, redaction at the operation boundary.

nodes.title: core/doctor.ts
nodes.summary: Pack health, ignore gaps, project MCP names, stale roots, Desktop config, launcher risks.

nodes.title: core/git.ts
nodes.summary: Branch, head commit, working-tree status, bounded diff context for resumes.

nodes.title: core/hash.ts
nodes.summary: sha256File + getFileRecord. Powers source-cache identity and stale detection.

nodes.title: core/store.ts
nodes.subtitle: 286 lines
nodes.summary: Finds pack roots, initPack(), appends ignore patterns, reads/writes state, appends events, serializes writes with .lock.

nodes.title: core/checkpoints.ts
nodes.summary: Creates checkpoint directories, manifests, resume snapshots, updates state pointer, diffs checkpoint pairs.

nodes.title: core/resume.ts
nodes.summary: Builds budgeted markdown context: state + git + source cache + decisions + dead ends + evidence + recent timeline.

nodes.title: core/budget.ts
nodes.summary: Token estimator + section packer. Required sections are kept or clipped, optional sections are omitted, and bounded output honors the requested estimate ceiling.

nodes.title: core/redaction.ts
nodes.summary: Strips root paths and configured secret patterns before state leaves the local ledger.

nodes.title: state.json
nodes.summary: Goal · current status · next actions · current checkpoint pointer.

nodes.title: events.jsonl
nodes.summary: Append-only timeline: decisions, notes, evidence, commands, sources, checkpoints.

nodes.title: sources.json
nodes.summary: Source-cache summaries keyed by path + sha256 so future agents avoid stale assumptions.

nodes.title: evidence/
nodes.summary: Local evidence payloads attached from command output, files, notes, links.

nodes.title: checkpoints/
nodes.summary: Durable checkpoint manifests and resume snapshots for recovery & comparison.

nodes.title: instructions/
nodes.summary: Generated client instructions for the Agentpack workflow.

nodes.title: resume / load_context
nodes.summary: Markdown task context: pack root, state, git, source-cache guidance, decisions, evidence, next actions.

nodes.title: exports/
nodes.summary: Markdown handoff fallback for clients that cannot read local MCP tools.

nodes.title: Client MCP config
nodes.summary: Project-local Codex / Claude / Cursor. Claude Desktop gets a merge snippet for global config.

nodes.title: doctor report
nodes.summary: Ok / warn / fail checks for pack setup, ignore rules, MCP launcher safety.

nodes.title: tests/agentpack.test.ts
nodes.summary: node --test suite covering CLI, pack state, source status, resumes, MCP tools, doctor, installs, redaction, budget.

nodes.title: scripts/mcp-smoke.mjs
nodes.summary: Builds CLI, starts MCP, sends initialize / tools/list / resume JSON-RPC, validates output.

nodes.title: release workflow
nodes.summary: ci.yml builds + tests + smokes + packs. publish.yml releases npm with provenance via OIDC Trusted Publisher.

flows.label: init workspace
flows.summary: Create local task-state ledger and keep it out of git.
steps: Developer runs `agentpack init` in a repo.
CLI resolves the workspace and calls `initPack()` in core/store.ts.
store.ts creates `.agentpack/` and default state.json, events.jsonl, sources.json.
`ensurePackIgnored()` appends local-only ignore patterns to .gitignore without replacing existing rules.

flows.label: install client
flows.summary: Generate client instructions + MCP launcher config for Codex / Claude / Cursor.
steps: Developer runs `agentpack install codex|claude|claude-desktop|cursor --write`.
`installIntegration()` builds the per-client file plan (dry-run unless --write).
Generated workflow instructions are written under `.agentpack/instructions/`.
Project-local clients get config files (.codex, .mcp.json, .cursor/mcp.json); Claude Desktop gets a merge snippet.

flows.label: source cache
flows.summary: Record source conclusions by hash and detect staleness on the next session.
steps: Agent inspects an important source file.
`record_source` (or `agentpack source add`) stores summary + snippet + path + sha256 via core/hash.ts.
`source_status` later compares recorded hashes against the working tree and git status.
Future resumes show unchanged sources as compact stubs and flag changed/missing files in full.

flows.label: checkpoint
flows.summary: Persist meaningful progress into durable state and a recoverable snapshot.
steps: Agent reaches a coherent boundary and calls `checkpoint`.
`checkpoints.ts` writes a manifest + resume snapshot under the Agentpack write lock.
state.json is updated with status, next actions, and the current checkpoint id.
events.jsonl gets a `checkpoint` event for the timeline.

flows.label: resume context
flows.summary: Pack current task state into budgeted markdown for the next agent.
steps: Agent calls `load_context` or `resume` with a preset, budget, and optional query.
core/resume.ts combines state + git + source cache + decisions + evidence + timeline.
core/budget.ts keeps required sections and reports truncated/omitted ones.
core/redaction.ts strips root paths + configured secrets before output leaves the ledger.
Result is returned via MCP, or written to `.agentpack/exports/` as a markdown fallback.

flows.label: doctor + CI
flows.summary: Catch broken setup, stale MCP roots, and release regressions.
steps: `agentpack doctor` reports pack health, ignore rules, launcher names, and stale roots.
Node tests cover CLI behavior, MCP tools, installs, source cache, redaction, budget packing.
`scripts/mcp-smoke.mjs` runs a JSON-RPC flow against the built server.
Release workflow publishes npm packages with provenance after build/test/smoke/pack checks.
